title: RCAN Joint Telemetry Object
description: §20 Telemetry Field Registry — Joint Telemetry object. Represents a single snapshot of sensor readings for one named joint. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

joint.description: Unique joint name within this robot (e.g. 'shoulder_pan', 'elbow_flex'). MUST be stable across reboots.

position_rad.description: Current joint angle in radians. For prismatic joints use position_m instead.

position_m.description: Current joint linear position in metres (prismatic joints only).

velocity_rad_s.description: Current joint angular velocity in rad/s. Positive = increasing angle.

velocity_m_s.description: Current joint linear velocity in m/s (prismatic joints only).

effort_nm.description: Current joint torque in Newton-metres. Positive = joint closing / forward effort.

temperature_c.description: Motor or actuator temperature in degrees Celsius.

error_flags.description: Driver-defined error bitmask. 0 = no errors. Bit definitions are hardware-specific.

timestamp_us.description: Hardware capture timestamp in microseconds since Unix epoch. MUST be monotonically increasing within a session.
